query:
UPDATE blogPosts SET 
  title = 'WizSound™: The Cinematic Audio Engine Behind Every WIZ AI Video',
  excerpt = 'Discover how WizSound™ transforms raw audio into an immersive, studio-quality cinematic experience — and why it makes WIZ AI videos sound different.',
  author = 'WIZ AI Team',
  coverImage = 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663500868908/ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx/showcase-cinematic-jTTeeqZXf4L3U5HPJLwD4n.webp'
WHERE id = 2;

UPDATE blogPosts SET 
  title = '7 AI Music Video Styles You Can Create with WIZ AI',
  excerpt = 'From Pixar-style animation to epic cinematic films — explore the 7 video styles available in WIZ AI and find the perfect look for your music.',
  author = 'WIZ AI Team',
  coverImage = 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663500868908/ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx/showcase-anime-gdkPWj4zZ3wPdwmswMeaY9.webp'
WHERE id = 3;

UPDATE blogPosts SET 
  title = 'How to Create a Cinematic Music Video with AI in Under 5 Minutes',
  excerpt = 'Learn how WIZ AI turns your song or idea into a full cinematic music video — storyboard, scenes, and final render — all in one place.',
  author = 'WIZ AI Team',
  coverImage = 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663500868908/ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx/showcase-music-video-6dF3UkNuwxfUVSax7gz7xi.webp'
WHERE id = 1;

UPDATE blogPosts SET author = 'WIZ AI Team' WHERE author = 'WizVid Team';
